calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Spousal Property Petition
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Of Litigation
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lily Moallem for George Iranon and Sean Iranon (Petitioners).

The Court noted that it received a withdrawal of the petition for approval of settlement of litigation and a disclaimer of David's interest. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order). Counsel will provide a proposed order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Of Litigation
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Continued To Feb-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sean Kenney for Geroge Iranon and Sean Iranon.

Mr. Kenney stated that he is not expecting Mr. Koplowitz or Mr. Boessenecker, that Mr. Boessenecker is requesting that the petition for approval of the settlement agreement be taken off calendar and that Mr. Boessenecker sent an e-mail to Ms. Hilton (Examiner). The Court noted that Mr. Boessenecker's Client consented to the relief, but still has a petition claiming his interest and he has not filed anything. Mr. Kenney suggested the Court grant the order for community property to have it all in one estate and stated that they are all the same heirs. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to February 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to get something to take the petition for approval of settlement off calendar and something indicating that Mr. Abraham is disclaiming his interest.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
